headline: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Highlights Strong Phase III Azetukalner Data, Q3 NDA Plans at Bloom Burton Conference
summary: Xenon Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:XENE) provided an update on its clinical and pipeline progress at the Bloom Burton conference, with CEO Ian Mortimer highlighting recent Phase III results for lead program azetukalner, plans for regulatory filings, and continued expansion into psychiatry and pain. headline: Bristol-Myers Squibb Precision Oncology Deal Meets Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) expanded its collaboration with Foundation Medicine to develop a next-generation sequencing based companion diagnostic. The test is designed to identify solid tumor patients with homozygous MTAP deletion for potential targeted cancer therapies in BMY’s pipeline. The collaboration focuses on precision oncology, aiming to better match investigational treatments to patients with specific genetic profiles. Bristol-Myers Squibb is a large biopharmaceutical company...
